// freeColour.qmd  —  custom colours for xochitl pen tools
//
// Installs at /home/root/xovi/exthome/qt-resource-rebuilder/freeColour.qmd
// and is loaded by qt-resource-rebuilder at xochitl startup.
//
// Mechanism (forked from FouzR/xovi-extensions/3.26/changeGreenColor.qmd):
// patches /qt/qml/xofm/libs/toolbar/qml/WritingTool.qml so that each colour-
// swatch delegate (`colorComponent`) runs a one-shot Timer on instantiation
// that may overwrite its toolColor / rgb / displayColor properties.
//
// The remap target is enum 9 (ARGB — the wildcard colour that takes the
// per-stroke RGBA channel; rmscene mislabels this as HIGHLIGHT). Strokes
// drawn with a remapped swatch land in the .rm file as `color = ARGB(9)` +
// `color_rgba = (the new RGB)`. The xochitl rasterizer honours that RGBA
// payload for HIGHLIGHTER_2 and SHADER tools (proven on-device by the
// experiments under ferrari/scratch/claude-notebook/). Solid pens
// (BALLPOINT, FINELINER, …) ignore RGBA when color === 9; on those tools a
// remapped swatch will draw whatever colour they default to for ARGB
// (likely yellow). Known limitation; v1 will scope substitutions per-tool.
//
// The two TEMPLATEs below give us both matching strategies:
//   - changeColorDefinitionsTemplate matches on toolColor (PenColor enum).
//     Works on pen tools whose palette lists the enum directly (ballpoint
//     uses 0,1,2,3,4,6,7,10,12 for its 9 colours).
//   - changeRgbTemplate matches on rgb (the swatch's colour code). Needed
//     for highlighter & shader, whose every swatch carries toolColor=9 and
//     differentiates only via rgb.
//
// CONFLICTS: this extension supersedes upstream changeGreenColor.qmd. Both
// patch the same WritingTool.qml AFFECT block; remove changeGreenColor.qmd
// before installing this. The Makefile does that automatically.

SLOT changeColorDefinitionsSlot

// Slot 10 (GREEN_2) → custom green. Preserves the upstream's substitution.
INSERT TEMPLATE changeColorDefinitionsTemplate {
    originalToolColor: 10
    newToolColor: 9
    newToolrgb: (0xFF338833)
    newDisplayColor: "#338833"
}

// Slot 12 (MAGENTA) → brown. DIAGNOSTIC: confirms the enum-match
// substitution mechanism fires on ballpoint. If ballpoint's magenta swatch
// becomes visibly brown, the upstream pattern is working as designed and
// we know to keep using enum match for pen tools. To revert: delete this
// block and reinstall.
INSERT TEMPLATE changeColorDefinitionsTemplate {
    originalToolColor: 12
    newToolColor: 9
    newToolrgb: (0xFF8B4513)
    newDisplayColor: "#8B4513"
}

// Highlighter PINK (rgb 0xFFF29EFF) → brown. Matches on the swatch's rgb
// value rather than the toolColor enum, since all highlighter swatches
// use enum 9 (ARGB). This is the substitution that actually serves the
// user's stated goal (brown for coloring-in on the highlighter).
INSERT TEMPLATE changeRgbTemplate {
    originalRgb: (0xFFF29EFF)
    newRgb: (0xFF8B4513)
    newDisplayColor: "#8B4513"
}

END SLOT

AFFECT [[6722609618937832156]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
REPLACE [[4129553690040935969]] WITH {
    function ~&4129553690040935969&~()
    {
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&254549367728975064&~.~&486403039092031347&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&6504326343&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&17088436279723538867&~(~&254549367728975064&~.~&478117897681566252&~());
        }
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254549367717124902&~ === 9 && !~&8399340017248501209&~.~&16051300290016870740&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&604284659367095156&~(~&8399340017248501209&~.~&8204156355941058436&~(), ~&8399340017248501209&~.~&6102119203847019330&~());
        }
        ~&5972376&~ (!~&8564000837190609446&~.~&9946718343130414977&~(~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254549061334391125&~)) {
            ~&6504254477&~.~&8168341223615502881&~(~&8564000837190609446&~.~&6102142810113562074&~());
        }
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[254533840317782502]]
REBUILD [[254524038664609014]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT { ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&214622605608&~ === 9 ? ~&5971598&~.~&214622605608&~("#" + ~&6504254477&~.~&197096108&~.~&254525455067777027&~.~&7713616118928163&~(16)) : }
END REBUILD
REBUILD [[475535838851480711]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT { ~&16359023780737766088&~ != ~&"503220030291830651&~ ? 2 : }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#[[7060683329257607547]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
property ~&6503679477&~ initialized: ~&214625660372&~
    ~&214604601930&~ {
        ~&7713147298280334&~: 0
        ~&233743626668842&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
        ~&495358363329399331&~: {
            ~&5972376&~ (!initialized) {

				~{changeColorDefinitionsSlot}~

                initialized = ~&6504329801&~;
            }
        }
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

// Match-on-enum: the upstream's original template, used for pen tools.
TEMPLATE changeColorDefinitionsTemplate {
		~&5972376&~ (~&254549367717124902&~ === ~{originalToolColor}~ ) {
			~&254549367717124902&~ = ~{newToolColor}~;
			~&197098340&~ = ~{newToolrgb}~;
			~&15784640987262621918&~ = ~{newDisplayColor}~;
		}
}

// Match-on-rgb: new template for highlighter/shader swatches whose
// toolColor is always 9 (ARGB) and which differentiate via rgb.
// toolColor stays 9 (already is), only rgb + displayColor change.
TEMPLATE changeRgbTemplate {
		~&5972376&~ (~&197098340&~ === ~{originalRgb}~ ) {
			~&197098340&~ = ~{newRgb}~;
			~&15784640987262621918&~ = ~{newDisplayColor}~;
		}
}
